title: Company Owner / COO

news_results.title: Moldova IT Park surpasses record 1 billion dollar turnover in 2025
news_results.snippet: IT Park resident companies including Monsato achieved 24.3% growth, employing 26,000 specialists.

companyDescription: Monsato became the official Kaspersky distributor in Moldova in 1998. In 2006 started providing software development services to American businesses.
